book.title: The Solo Scale Playbook
book.subtitle: How to grow a one-person business past six figures without hiring a team.
book.description: The exact playbook for staying solo and scaling anyway. Productize your offer, automate the busywork, and build a business that earns like a team but runs like a solopreneur.
whatYouLearn: Productizing a service so it sells while you sleep
Automation stacks that replace a junior hire
Pricing for leverage instead of hours
The 3-client model that replaces a full roster

faq.q: I already have clients. Will this help?
faq.a: Yes — the playbook is built for working solopreneurs who want fewer clients, higher rates, and more leverage.

faq.q: Do I need to know how to code to automate?
faq.a: No. Every automation uses no-code tools and clear recipes.

sections.heading: A note before you begin
body: This is a preview of the opening of the book. The full version includes every chapter, every framework, and every template referenced inside.
Grab a notebook. The frameworks inside are meant to be used, not just read.
